scope.selection_note: Codex-only entity prep from current data/canonical/entities.jsonl, current data/identity-overrides/merges.json, current data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json, and checked-in validateRepo duplicate_global_identity backlog artifacts. No provider-backed, materialize, validate, or export commands were run.

exclusions_and_guards: Only entity duplicate_global_identity issues from data/identity-review/validation_issues.jsonl and data/identity-review/candidate_edges.jsonl were considered; no validateRepo or CLI validate command was run in this task.
Every proposed alias_id and target_id was checked against current data/canonical/entities.jsonl and exists as a current record_id.
Checked current data/identity-overrides/merges.json; no proposed alias_id is already a merge alias and no proposed target_id is a merge alias.
Checked current data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json; no proposed pair is covered by a do-not-merge guard.

Excluded already-merged stale backlog hits such as 34th Street Partnership, Arnie Bloch, Bedford Mosholu Community Association, 34th Street CAC, NYPD, TLC, Port Authority, Pratt Center Community Division, Scott Stringer, Will Carry, and Zetlin Strategic Communications.

Excluded broad or ambiguous community-board collisions when the validator key did not distinguish borough and the source/canonical evidence pointed to different boroughs, including Brooklyn CB1 vs Bronx/Manhattan/Staten Island CB1, Bronx CB3 vs Brooklyn/Staten Island CB3, Bronx CB4/5/6 vs Manhattan CB4/5/6 broad-key collisions, Bronx CB7 broad-key collisions, and Brooklyn CB9 vs Manhattan CB9.
Excluded community-advisory-committee broad-key collisions across Flushing-Jamaica, Webster, and Hylan because the committee name alone is insufficient to merge distinct project advisory committees.
Excluded entity_mta-bus-company <-> entity_mta-nyct because MTA Bus Company and New York City Transit are distinct agency/division identities despite a shared stale source-specific identity key.
Prepared only eight proposals because those were the high-confidence current entity aliases that satisfied the guard checks without relying on cross-borough or project-committee ambiguity.

command_evidence.purpose: Read the checked-in validateRepo entity duplicate_global_identity backlog without running validation.

command_evidence.command: bun -e '<local read-only parser over entities.jsonl, merges.json, do-not-merge.json, and validation_issues.jsonl>'
command_evidence.purpose: Mechanically filtered validator pairs for current record_id presence, already-merged aliases, target merge-alias chains, alias==target, and do-not-merge hits.

command_evidence.command: bun -e '<local read-only parser over data/identity-review/candidate_edges.jsonl with the same guards>'
command_evidence.purpose: Cross-checked candidate-edge validator messages and shared keys for the remaining non-stale entity backlog.
Inspected current canonical entity records, aliases, source ids, payload names/types, and evidence refs for each proposed pair.
Read local source blocks for evidence quotes where canonical evidence_refs did not already include source_quote.
